name: Bitbucket
description: Monitor Bitbucket repositories and workspace members for source code management and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
2. Click "Create API token with scopes"
3. Name the token, set an expiry date, and select Bitbucket as the app
4. Assign Repositories: Read and User data: Read permissions
5. Copy the token (it is only shown once)
6. Enter your Atlassian account email and the API token below

Note: Bitbucket App Passwords have been deprecated. Use API tokens instead.

credentialFields.label: Atlassian Account Email
credentialFields.helpText: Your Atlassian account email address (listed under Email Aliases in Bitbucket Personal Settings)

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Created in Atlassian Account Settings > Security > API tokens

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Lists Bitbucket repositories to verify code changes are tracked

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Bitbucket workspace members for employee access management
